title: Large-scale Phenology Extraction with phenofit
author: Qinyue, Yu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This code is adapted from Kong [1], with modifications to support chunked reading and processing for large-scale datasets. 
 This repository provides an R workflow for extracting vegetation phenology from VI time series on large spatial and temporal scales, based on the phenofit package (V3.0). We applied the workflow to the Yellow River Basin using long-term (2000–2023), 500m 8-day mutiple vegetation indices time series.
steps_raw:
This code is adapted from Kong [1], with modifications to support chunked reading and processing for large-scale datasets. 
 This repository provides an R workflow for extracting vegetation phenology from VI time series on large spatial and temporal scales, based on the phenofit package (V3.0). We applied the workflow to the Yellow River Basin using long-term (2000–2023), 500m 8-day mutiple vegetation indices time series.
